---
mode: agent
description: Shortcut to the superpowers:paper-to-implementation skill with workflow handoff
---

Tell your human partner you are switching to the `superpowers:paper-to-implementation` skill.

Before acting, resolve or create the active workflow in the current project root, load the latest workflow state and formal artifacts, and then follow the `superpowers:paper-to-implementation` skill (which includes the shared workflow protocol).
